languages.text: "Я был там несколько раз, разыскивая реликвии среди древних погибших кораблей. Возможно, в их недрах и можно найти нечто воистину ценное для истории, однако без вящего подтверждения значимости подобные находки малоинтересны для меня".

traits.locale_text: "Я был там несколько раз, разыскивая реликвии среди древних погибших кораблей. Возможно, в их недрах и можно найти нечто воистину ценное для истории, однако без вящего подтверждения значимости подобные находки малоинтересны для меня".

languages.text: "I have been there several times, searching for relics among the ancient wrecks. It may be possible to find something of real historical value in their depths, but without strong evidence of their significance, such finds are of little interest to me."
languages.original_text: "Я был там несколько раз, разыскивая реликвии среди древних погибших кораблей. Возможно, в их недрах и можно найти нечто воистину ценное для истории, однако без вящего подтверждения значимости подобные находки малоинтересны для меня".

traits.locale_text: "I have been there several times, searching for relics among the ancient wrecks. It may be possible to find something of real historical value in their depths, but without strong evidence of their significance, such finds are of little interest to me."

"I have been there several times, searching for relics among the ancient wrecks. It may be possible to find something of real historical value in their depths, but without strong evidence of their significance, such finds are of little interest to me."

"I have been there several times, searching for relics among the ancient wrecks. It may be possible to find something of real historical value in their depths, but without strong evidence of their significance, such finds are of little interest to me."

languages.text: “我曾多次前往那里，在古老的残骸中搜寻圣物。或许能在深处找到真正具有历史价值的东西，可若是没有强有力的证据证明其重要性，这类发现于我而言索然无味‌。”
languages.original_text: "I have been there several times, searching for relics among the ancient wrecks. It may be possible to find something of real historical value in their depths, but without strong evidence of their significance, such finds are of little interest to me."

traits.locale_text: “我曾多次前往那里，在古老的残骸中搜寻圣物。或许能在深处找到真正具有历史价值的东西，可若是没有强有力的证据证明其重要性，这类发现于我而言索然无味‌。”

languages.text: «He estado varias veces, buscando reliquias entre los antiguos pecios. Tal vez sea posible encontrar algo con valor histórico real en sus profundidades, pero, sin una prueba suficiente de su importancia, estos hallazgos carecerían de valor para mí».
languages.original_text: "I have been there several times, searching for relics among the ancient wrecks. It may be possible to find something of real historical value in their depths, but without strong evidence of their significance, such finds are of little interest to me."

traits.locale_text: «He estado varias veces, buscando reliquias entre los antiguos pecios. Tal vez sea posible encontrar algo con valor histórico real en sus profundidades, pero, sin una prueba suficiente de su importancia, estos hallazgos carecerían de valor para mí».

languages.text: « Je m'y suis rendu à plusieurs reprises, à la recherche de reliques au sein de ces antiques épaves. Il est possible que des trouvailles possédant une véritable valeur historique se dissimulent dans leurs profondeurs, mais sans preuve de leur importance, je n'y porte que peu d'intérêt. »
languages.original_text: "I have been there several times, searching for relics among the ancient wrecks. It may be possible to find something of real historical value in their depths, but without strong evidence of their significance, such finds are of little interest to me."

traits.locale_text: « Je m'y suis rendu à plusieurs reprises, à la recherche de reliques au sein de ces antiques épaves. Il est possible que des trouvailles possédant une véritable valeur historique se dissimulent dans leurs profondeurs, mais sans preuve de leur importance, je n'y porte que peu d'intérêt. »

languages.text: "Kadim enkazlar arasında yadigâr aramak için oraya birkaç kez gittim. Derinliklerinde gerçek tarihî değere sahip bir şeyler bulmak mümkün olabilir ancak önemlerine dair güçlü kanıtlar olmadıkça bu tür buluntular pek ilgimi çekmiyor."
languages.original_text: "I have been there several times, searching for relics among the ancient wrecks. It may be possible to find something of real historical value in their depths, but without strong evidence of their significance, such finds are of little interest to me."

traits.locale_text: "Kadim enkazlar arasında yadigâr aramak için oraya birkaç kez gittim. Derinliklerinde gerçek tarihî değere sahip bir şeyler bulmak mümkün olabilir ancak önemlerine dair güçlü kanıtlar olmadıkça bu tür buluntular pek ilgimi çekmiyor."

languages.text: "Ich war mehrere Male dort, um in den alten Wracks nach Relikten zu suchen. Möglicherweise warten in ihren Tiefen Stücke von echtem historischem Wert, aber ohne klare Beweise ihrer Bedeutung sind derartige Funde für mich nur von geringem Interesse."
languages.original_text: "I have been there several times, searching for relics among the ancient wrecks. It may be possible to find something of real historical value in their depths, but without strong evidence of their significance, such finds are of little interest to me."

traits.locale_text: "Ich war mehrere Male dort, um in den alten Wracks nach Relikten zu suchen. Möglicherweise warten in ihren Tiefen Stücke von echtem historischem Wert, aber ohne klare Beweise ihrer Bedeutung sind derartige Funde für mich nur von geringem Interesse."

languages.text: 「私は何度もその場所を訪れ、古代の船の残骸の中から遺物を探してきました。その深海には、歴史的に価値のあるものが発見できるかもしれません。しかし、その重要性を裏付ける確かな証拠がない限り、私はそのような発見にはあまり興味がありません。」
languages.original_text: "I have been there several times, searching for relics among the ancient wrecks. It may be possible to find something of real historical value in their depths, but without strong evidence of their significance, such finds are of little interest to me."

traits.locale_text: 「私は何度もその場所を訪れ、古代の船の残骸の中から遺物を探してきました。その深海には、歴史的に価値のあるものが発見できるかもしれません。しかし、その重要性を裏付ける確かな証拠がない限り、私はそのような発見にはあまり興味がありません。」
